name: com.heartflystudios.zededitor
description:
Zed code editor integration for Unity. Makes the Zed code editor get treated as a "first-class" code editor by the Unity Editor.
It works either alone or with its sister Zed Extension to bring some big improvements to working in Zed with Unity projects.

Features:
- Integrates Unity specific Roslyn Analyzers so that code-analysis ("IntelliSense") are as helpful as possible and irrelevant rules (therefore squiggly lines) are suppressed.
- Launch Zed from Unity Editor. Automatically locates Zed installation for you.
- Fully supports Linux, Windows and MacOS without any additional dependencies.
- Generates solution and project files for "Local", "Embedded", "Unity Registry", "Git", "Built-In", "Player" and "LocalTarBall" assemblies. Just as though Unity had shipped with Zed code editor support.
- Opens your scripts in Zed via double-clicking .cs files and/or Unity Debug Logs, and jumps to correct file/line.

Features (when Zed Extension installed):
- Streams Unity Debug Log to Zed editor.
- Assets Refresh status update inside Zed editor GUI.
